title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
